role: Co-founder of Manoto TV; Iranian-British media entrepreneur
bio: Marjan Abbassi is an Iranian-British media entrepreneur and co-founder of [Manoto TV](/orgs/manoto-tv) alongside her husband [Kayvan Abbassi](/people/kayvan-abbassi). Launched in 2010, Manoto became one of the most-watched Persian-language satellite channels among Iranians in Iran and the diaspora, known for entertainment programming and, increasingly, news coverage. Marjan Abbassi has served in a senior executive role at Manoto, contributing to building one of the most commercially successful diaspora Persian media organisations.
editorial_notes: Co-founded Manoto TV 2010 with Kayvan Abbassi (husband). Iranian-British. Based in UK.
